---
title: "Chris Lake"
subtitle: "Data Scientist · Causal Inference & Experimentation"
---

I'm a data scientist specializing in causal inference, experimentation, and applied machine learning. I focus on answering *why* questions — not just *what* — using methods like difference-in-differences, synthetic control, and regression discontinuity.

I currently work in data science at Booking.com, where I build data products and analytical frameworks at scale.

## Projects

| Project | Methods | Domain |
|---|---|---|
| [NBA 65-Game Rule](projects.qmd) | Difference-in-Differences | Sports |
| [Netflix Market Entry & Genre](projects.qmd) | Difference-in-Differences | Entertainment |
| More coming soon | | |

## Get in Touch

- GitHub: [github.com/chris-lake](https://github.com/chris-lake)
